---
title: "Chittagong Diabetes Data Analysis"
subtitle: "A reproducible diabetes data analysis and mapping project for Chattogram"
author: "Miskatul Anwar"
date: "2026-06-05"
number-sections: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

This project presents a reproducible workflow for cleaning, analyzing, and mapping diabetes patient data from the Chittagong region.

The analysis covers clinical data preparation, thana-level distribution, age-group patterns, City Corporation classification, spatial mapping, and control-status visualization.

Use the pages below to explore the full workflow.

## Start Here

- [Data Cleaning and Standardization](process/data-wrangling.html)

  Clean raw diabetes records, remove duplicates, update fasting glucose values, and prepare the dataset for analysis.

- [Clinical Pattern Analysis](process/fasting-body-composition-lifestyle.html)

  Explore fasting glucose, body composition, and lifestyle-related patterns by age group.

- [Final Calculation and Regional Summary](process/final_calculation.html)

  Review thana-level population distribution, City Corporation grouping, and age-group percentage summaries.

## Spatial Maps

- [City Corporation Map](process/City-Copr-Map.html)

  View diabetes distribution and age-group composition across Chattogram City Corporation thanas.

- [Chattogram District Map](process/subdistrict-CC-Map.html)

  Compare diabetes distribution between Chattogram City Corporation and outside-City-Corporation upazilas.

- [Control Status Map](process/controlled-uncontrolled.html)

  View diabetes share by thana with controlled and uncontrolled status shown using pie charts.
